name: Prince of Persia
description: Prince of Persia 1.4 (1990). Classic platformer. Sound drivers disabled (renamed .BAK): the bundled SB Pro / speaker-digital drivers run a ~7 kHz PIT ISR that starves a 4.77 MHz 8086. Boot shows two 'press any key' sound dialogs.

playTips: Press Space to skip the title screen.
Hold Right and Up using the hold mode to make longer jumps.
This will be horrible to control - I will give anyone £20 if they successfully complete the game using this player.
